page_content:
Prerequisite: TLPL654.

Corequisite: TLPL733.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCI762 or TLPL734.

Formerly: EDCI762.

TLPL738 Theory and Research in Reading (3 Credits)

Survey of the literature in reading and allied fields, and an examination of current research trends and methodologies.

Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
